sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75684" key="o)sxofo/ria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀσχο-φόρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀσχο-φόριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀσχο-φόροι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, etc., <sense id="n75684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὠσχ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
